basic_details.job_title: NIT Jamshedpur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Jamshedpur (NIT Jamshedpur) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 has been released on 24 June 2026 on the official website nitjsr.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Jamshedpur Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: As per the norms of the Govt. of India/DST-ANRF for JRF recruitment.
age_limit.details: As per the norms of the Govt. of India/DST-ANRF for JRF recruitment.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech. and M.Tech. or equivalent degree in Civil Engineering or equivalent with First class (6.5 grades point out of 10) or 60% marks, GATE desirable
qualification.details: B.Tech. and M.Tech. or equivalent degree in Civil Engineering or equivalent with First class (6.5 grades point out of 10) or 60% marks. GATE is desirable.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Jamshedpur Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 09-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download NIT Jamshedpur Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Jamshedpur JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at NIT Jamshedpur is 09 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Tech. and M.Tech. or equivalent degree in Civil Engineering or a related field with a First Class or 60% marks. GATE qualification is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the JRF position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post at the National Institute of Technology Jamshedpur.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37000 plus House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the NIT Jamshedpur JRF recruitment must be submitted via email.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the JRF position?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is NIT Jamshedpur located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Jamshedpur is located in Jamshedpur, Jharkhand, with the pincode 831014.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Junior Research Fellow (JRF) recruitment is NITJSR/CE/2026/11.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at NIT Jamshedpur is a contractual role.
